positive: A majestic, stylized mountain range silhouette viewed at dawn. The foreground features simplified, decorative elements like crystalline geometric formations and stylized forest patches. Use a deep indigo and vibrant turquoise color palette, with accents of luminous gold emanating from the horizon line. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and highly scalable for screen printing, featuring clean lines and strong contrast. Minimal detail, maximum impact. Vector art style, perfect for apparel printing, high contrast, stylized nature.
